name: Daily Backup to HQ
description: Encrypt and upload daily workspace backup to HQ storage

run.prompt: MANDATORY INSTRUCTIONS - EXECUTE USING TOOLS: (1) Run ~/.openclaw/workspace/skills/backup-to-hq-zip/backup-to-hq-zip.sh via exec tool; (2) Verify backup file created in ~/teamfoundry.ai/teamHQ/Agents-InService/Warren/snapshots/; (3) Confirm backup size is reasonable (>1MB, <500MB); (4) If backup successful: DELIVERY via Slack message tool EXACTLY: target='channel:agent-ops', action='send', caption='✅ Daily backup complete: backup-YYYY-MM-DD_HHMMSS.7z'. If backup fails: target='supervisor-id' with caption='🚨 Backup failed - manual intervention required'. CRITICAL: Use the canonical message-signing standard from the employee handbook. DO NOT include backup contents in message - only filename and status.

_translationBindings.corpusDiff: Schedule and mode match APP playbook.schedule; prompt channel/supervisor placeholders substituted from assembly context; agent name path uses Warren from identity assembly
